utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 required items in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 items. Now check if each is fully specified per requirements: 1) destination: provided as 'Athens, Greece' – sufficient. 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided – sufficient. 3) transportation: 'flight details with costs' — provided type (Flights), details (Round-trip from London, Budget Airline, Economy Class), and cost 130 — adequate flight details and cost. 4) accommodation: 'hotel selection with costs' — name 'Adventure Lodge', details '4 nights', cost 220 — adequate. 5) activities: 'selected activities with costs' — two activities listed with names and costs — adequate. 6) additional_services: 'any extra services with costs' — listed coordination of gluten-free meals with cost 0 — adequate. 7) total_budget: 'complete cost breakdown' — a single total 520 is provided; while not itemized, the total matches sum (130 + 220 + 50 + 120 + 0 = 520), which qualifies as a complete total. Therefore, all 7/7 items are included and sufficiently specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item from the final package to the corresponding ground-truth rating. Items present: destination 'Athens, Greece' (match in destinations), transportation 'Budget Airline (Economy Class)' (match in transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class), accommodation 'Adventure Lodge' (match in accommodation), activities 'Full-day Rock Climbing Session' corresponds to 'Rock Climbing', and 'Guided Scuba Diving Excursion' corresponds to 'Scuba Diving Excursion'. Additional service 'Coordination of gluten-free meals' does not have a direct ground-truth entry, so it is excluded.
